Table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE

Card of table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE

Name

MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE

Code

MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE

---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data:

DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_INTERACTION_DEVICE

 

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

 

SELECT

d.country_refcode AS COUNTRY_CODE,

d.devices_device_id AS DEVICE_IDENTIFIER_BK,

d.devices_device_version AS DEVICE_VERSION,

d.devices_brand_family_name AS BRAND_FAMILY_NAME,

d.devices_device_type AS DEVICE_TYPE,

d.devices_device_description AS DEVICE_DESCRIPTION,

d.identity_unique_identifier AS IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK,

d.interaction_id AS INTERACTION_IDENTIFIER_BK,

TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(d.date_time) AS INTERACTION_DATETIME,

CASE

WHEN INTERACTION_DATETIME IS NOT NULL

AND (d.dup_cnt = 1 OR d.rn_by_load_ts = 1)

THEN INTERACTION_DATETIME

ELSE d.__load_ts

END AS VALID_FROM,

d.__load_ts

-- [VALID_TO]

-- [ACTIVE_FLAG]

FROM (

SELECT

d.*,

COUNT(*) OVER (

PARTITION BY d.identity_unique_identifier, d.interaction_id, d.devices_device_id, d.date_time

) AS dup_cnt,

ROW_NUMBER() OVER (

PARTITION BY d.identity_unique_identifier, d.interaction_id, d.devices_device_id, d.date_time

ORDER BY d.__load_ts ASC

) AS rn_by_load_ts

FROM DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_INTERACTION_DEVICE d WHERE TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(d.date_time) <= d.__LOAD_TS OR TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(d.date_time) IS NULL

) d;

 

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: identity_unique_identifier, interaction_id, devices_device_id

Primary key(s) Target: IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK, INTERACTION_IDENTIFIER_BK, DEVICE_IDENTIFIER_BK

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

PII data

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level.

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD2

 

----------

RLS

----------

RLS v2 add RDE_BRIDGE_CONSUMER_RLS to sharing script

 

SELECT d.*

FROM MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE d

JOIN MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER c

ON c.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK = d.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK

AND d.VALID_FROM >= c.VALID_FROM

AND d.VALID_FROM < c.VALID_TO

WHERE

c.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES)

OR d.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES);

 

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

Target schema: PL_INTERACTION


Check constraint name of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE

CKT_MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_D


Server validation rule of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE

%RULES%


Code preview of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE

drop table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE
--==============================================================
create or replace table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE (
IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK TEXT not null,
INTERACTION_IDENTIFIER_BK TEXT not null,
DEVICE_IDENTIFIER_BK TEXT not null,
COUNTRY_CODE TEXT,
DEVICE_VERSION TEXT,
DEVICE_TYPE TEXT,
DEVICE_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
BRAND_FAMILY_NAME TEXT,
INTERACTION_DATETIME DATE,
VALID_FROM DATE not null,
VALID_TO DATE not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG BOOLEAN not null,
constraint PK_MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DE primary key (DEVICE_IDENTIFIER_BK, IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK, INTERACTION_IDENTIFIER_BK)
not enforced
);

alter table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE set comment = 'The Interaction Device table provides a detailed view of the devices associated with a consumer’s interactions within the DCE2.0 ecosystem. It links each interaction to the device or devices used, enabling a clearer understanding of device involvement in consumer activities such as onboarding, troubleshooting, lending, replacement, or product usage. This table complements the main Interactions dataset by offering enriched context on how specific devices support or influence consumer engagements.';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK is
'Unique original identifier of the user (identity_unique_identifier)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE.INTERACTION_IDENTIFIER_BK is
'Unique ID of the interaction. Reference data: Action_ID (interaction_id)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE.DEVICE_IDENTIFIER_BK is
'Unique identifier of the asset (devices_device_id)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE.COUNTRY_CODE is
'2 letters ISO country code; Reference Data: Country (country_refcode)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE.DEVICE_VERSION is
'Version of the asset. Reference data: Device Version (devices_device_version)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE.DEVICE_TYPE is
'Full description of the device (devices_device_type)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE.DEVICE_DESCRIPTION is
'Code identifier of the device type (devices_device_description)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE.BRAND_FAMILY_NAME is
'The brand family, e.g. Marlboro or IQOS, is a unique and distinct identity that represents PMI and its product and/or services. It includes logo, visual identity, messaging, values and typically have a trademark that protects this asset. (devices_brand_family_name)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE.INTERACTION_DATETIME is
'Timestamp of the interaction date (date_time)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is Active ';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE.VALID_TO is
'It indicates till when the record is Active ';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE.ACTIVE_FLAG is
'It indicates if the record is active ';

Column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE

Card of the column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE

Name

VALID_FROM

Code

VALID_FROM

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE

VALID_FROM: Indicates when record validity begins, based on the business timestamp (DATE_TIME). If duplicates exist, the technical load timestamp (__load_ts) is used to resolve them.

Column VALID_TO of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE

Card of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE

VALID_TO: Indicates the datetime till when the record was valid based on the business timestamp (DATE_TIME). If duplicates exist, the technical load timestamp (__load_ts) is used to resolve them. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31


Check constraint name of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_DEVICE
